title: Modeling Others Minds as Code
project_takeaway: 把日常路线/行为写成可编辑脚本，不让 LLM 直接给最终行动。

title: HumanLM: Simulating Users with State Alignment Beats Response Imitation
topic: 用户模拟 / 状态对齐
project_takeaway: 人物画像必须有潜在状态，不能只有年龄收入和一句 persona。

title: Real world community oriented high-definition social simulation
project_takeaway: 采用微观 + 宏观双验证；真实数据缺口要保持显式。

title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
project_takeaway: 记忆、反思、计划可借鉴；但 25 人小镇不是商业选址验证。

title: Out of One, Many: Using Language Models to Simulate Human Samples
project_takeaway: 提醒按真实样本/群体分布模拟，而非一个平均人。

title: Using Large Language Models to Simulate Multiple Humans and Replicate Human Subject Studies
topic: 多人模拟 / 实验复现
project_takeaway: 可用于设计“AI 被试”验证，但结果须和真人/真实数据比较。

title: Generative Agent Simulations of 1,000 People
verified_source: 老板长图线索 / 需进一步核验
project_takeaway: 重点是丰富记忆素材与专家反思，不是裸人设。

title: Large Language Models for Market Research: A Data-augmentation Approach
topic: 市场研究 / 数据增强
project_takeaway: AI 可补样本和辅助早期方向，但不能替代正式调研。

title: The Challenge of Using LLMs to Simulate Human Behavior: A Causal Inference Perspective
project_takeaway: 不能把相关性/TGI 直接当因果；需要干预前后验证。

title: Do Large Language Models Solve the Problems of Agent-Based Modeling?
project_takeaway: LLM 不自动解决 ABM 的校准、验证、可复现问题。

title: Can Large Language Models Transform Computational Social Science?
project_takeaway: LLM 可扩展解释与文本任务，但要和计算模型分工。

title: Large Language Models as Simulated Economic Agents: What Can We Learn from Homo Silicus?
topic: 经济实验 / 模拟主体
project_takeaway: 经济选择模拟可参考，但需警惕模型偏见和身份扁平化。

title: Large language models that replace human participants can harmfully misportray and flatten identity groups
project_takeaway: 禁止把“平均游客”写成全部人群；要保留差异和不确定性。

title: Diminished diversity-of-thought in a standard large language model
project_takeaway: 多智能体不等于多样性，需从真实数据和参数层增加差异。

title: Social Force Model for Pedestrian Dynamics
project_takeaway: 路线/拥挤/避让不能纯靠 LLM；后续可接入人流/路径模型。

title: Reciprocal Velocity Obstacles for Real-Time Multi-Agent Navigation
project_takeaway: 若做可视化仿真轨迹，需要基础运动约束和碰撞/避让逻辑。

title: The Multi-Agent Transport Simulation MATSim
project_takeaway: 大规模出行仿真要有日程、网络、选择与校准，不是页面动画。

title: Gravity and Spatial Interaction Models
topic: 空间交互 / 重力模型
project_takeaway: 业态吸引力、距离衰减和外溢可用作可解释基础。

title: A Logit Model of Brand Choice Calibrated on Scanner Data
topic: 离散选择 / 品牌选择
project_takeaway: 消费选择概率可用离散选择思想，而非 LLM 一句话决定。

title: Retail Location Choice with Complementary Goods: An Agent-Based Model
topic: 零售选址 / 互补品 ABM
project_takeaway: 候选业态之间有互补/替代关系，不能单点孤立评估。

title: A survey on large language model based autonomous agents
project_takeaway: 用于梳理记忆、规划、工具调用，但不替代领域模型。
